rationale: Educ. Code §43.0051 governs State Board of Education transfers within the Permanent School Fund. It is unrelated to residence homestead exemptions or property tax appraisal under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: The State Board of Education may transfer funds from the portion of the permanent school fund managed by the State Board of Education to the real estate special fund account of the permanent school fund
_note: No conflict. The rule concerns PSF internal fund transfers, not homestead exemptions or school district property tax revenue.
